why: CHART: rollover from HOD 7135.9 — lower closes 10:10 7134.3>10:15 7133.8>10:20 7126.4, just broke below VWAP-proxy 7126.9 (bearish), 15-min momentum accelerating down -0.12%. GEX CONFIRM: positive-gamma pin COLLAPSED, regime flipped to NEGATIVE gamma -17M = fuel; near 7100 floor dissolved (now 7070, ~57pts of air below); king pika 7165 far overhead not helping bulls. Pin-transition short with room to run.

THESIS BROKEN + REGIME FLIP. Short was predicated on pin-collapse + negative-gamma fuel + VWAP-loss flush. None confirmed: VWAP 7127 held as support, price chopped back UP to 7129.4 (never broke 7126.4 swing low), and regime flipped from -19M NEGATIVE back to +9M POSITIVE gamma (pin/chop, levels hold) = fuel gone. Cut at ~breakeven per manage rule (exit when confirming regime flips).

CHART: exhaustion flush bottomed at 7112.4, held the 7109 open/day-low, 10:50 candle turned GREEN (C7115.4), 5-min momentum bottomed (flat). Bounce underway off support. GEX CONFIRM: POSITIVE gamma +10M (levels hold, supports bounce) + strong 7070 pika KING floor (+26M) below. Capped scalp long targeting the 7125 barney cap (~7123 exit); stop below 7109 open.

STOP HIT. Long bounce thesis broken: price broke the 7109 open/day-low to new low 7107, negating the 10:50 reversal; 15-min momentum accelerating down -0.26%. Despite massive positive-gamma floor +37M, the dominant magnet is the 7070 pika king far below and price is gravitating to it, not bouncing off 7109. Cut at stop, -8pts underlying.

CHART: exhaustion-V off day-low 7086.7 after a 45pt flush (7135>7086) — 11:05 candle strong green C7097.3 (+10.6), 5-min momentum flipped POSITIVE. GEX CONFIRM: bounced in extreme positive gamma (+69M, levels hold = 7086 low holds); overhead 7100 pika DISSOLVED leaving clean air to VWAP 7121 / 7125 barney (~24pts room). Mean-reversion scalp long targeting 7118-7121; stop below 7089 (V negation).

CAP THE WINNER. Exhaustion-V long worked +5pts (7097.3>7104) but has STALLED: 3 candles flat at 7102, 5-min momentum died to +0.05%, 15-min near flat -0.02%, re-pinning in positive gamma (+64M) well short of the 7120 VWAP target. 0DTE bounces round-trip — banking the gain before the stall fades back to 7090. Barney 7125 cap unreached but momentum gone.
